query: with principals(id) as ( select id from tml_switchboard.principals($1::uuid) ) select ( exists (select 1 from principals where id = $4::uuid) or exists ( select 1 from tml_switchboard.image_groups g join principals p on g.owner_subject = p.id where g.id = $2::uuid ) or exists ( select 1 from tml_switchboard.image_group_grants gr join principals p on gr.subject_id = p.id where gr.group_id = $2::uuid and gr.permission::text = $3 ) ) as "authorized!"
